ranked_matches.title: Sheffield Shield Final: Victoria vs South Australia (Day 3 of 4)
Australia U20 vs China U20 (Friendship Series)

summary: The Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 season kicks off today, March 28, 2026, with the opening match between defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Sunrisers Hyderabad. The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is also currently in progress, scheduled to conclude on March 29. The AFC U20 Asian Cup 2025 has concluded; however, the Australia U20 team is playing China U20 in a friendly match today.
